labels.notes: Paul Beal 1:22pm — 27-min visit, MTO medical form completion + new-patient intake covering hypertension (BP 172/95), suspected diabetes (urine glucose elevated, no labs in 3 yrs), skin tags counselling, vision/hearing review, blood work req. SOAP and dx 250 (Diabetes) correct. DEFECT (Class E billing missing Q-code): saved billing has A004A + K030A only, timeEntries=[]. Q310A missing. Differential vs Larry Barber 840eea49 (same 26-27 min visit, same general_reassessment + diabetic_assessment combo, also 250) which DID get Q310A added. Two-stage extraction returned visitType=general_reassessment, conditions=[diabetic_assessment], estimatedDurationMinutes=25 (1st extraction) / 25 (2nd) — input identical to Larry's. ROOT CAUSE: rule_engine time-tracking branch didn't fire Q310A for Paul despite duration ≥15 min. Possible: time_tracking.rs::Q310 unit derivation branched on a condition (visit_setting? K013_exhausted? referral_received?) that differs in BillingContext between the two sessions. Worth pulling both sessions' BillingContext snapshot from pipeline_log to diff them.
